data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an 'Equipment on-site log' as part of the use case needs. However, the linked use case does not provide any evidence or details regarding the implementation of this specific log, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The absence of this critical feature in the evidence suggests that the requirement is not met, as it is explicitly listed as a need in the use case.
gaps: No evidence of an 'Equipment on-site log' functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
